title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Tata Communications

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Tata Communications
jsonLd.description:
Join the Tata Communications family as a Frontend Developer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Tata Communications:
Tata Communications is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications!
